name: Text Summarizer
description_en: Summarize any text into 2-3 sentences while preserving key facts.
description_zh: 将任意文本压缩为 2-3 句话，同时保留关键事实。
long_en: A copy-paste prompt for quick summarization. Pass any article, email, or document as {input} and get a tight 2-3 sentence summary that keeps every key fact without adding new claims.
long_zh: 即用型摘要提示词。将文章、邮件或文档作为 {input} 传入，即可获得保留所有关键事实、不添加新主张的 2-3 句精简摘要。
sec_note_en: Plain text transformation prompt; no tool access or external calls.
sec_note_zh: 纯文本转换提示词；不涉及工具调用或外部请求。
